name: logic-mesh
description: Control logic engine using event based and reactive blocks written in Rust.

scripts.build: wasm-pack build --release --out-dir web/packages/logic-mesh/pkg ../../.. && npm run build:copy && npm run build:clean
scripts.build:dev: wasm-pack build --dev --out-dir web/packages/logic-mesh/pkg ../../.. && npm run build:copy && npm run build:clean
